diffs.diff:
--- a/explore_pi0_arch.py
+++ b/explore_pi0_arch.py
@@ -0,0 +1,45 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env python3

+"""Explore Pi0 model architecture to find LoRA target modules."""

+import os

+import torch

+

+os.environ['HF_HUB_OFFLINE'] = '1'

+

+from lerobot.policies.pi0 import PI0Policy

+

+device = torch.device('cuda' if torch.cuda.is_available() else 'cpu')

+print(f"Device: {device}")

+

+policy = PI0Policy.from_pretrained('lerobot/pi0_base')

+print("Policy loaded")

+

+# Print all named modules

+print("\n=== All named modules (first 100) ===")

+for i, (name, module) in enumerate(policy.named_modules()):

+    if i > 100:

+        print("... (truncated)")

+        break

+    print(f"  {name}: {type(module).__name__}")

+

+print("\n=== Linear modules ===")

+for name, module in policy.named_modules():

+    if isinstance(module, torch.nn.Linear):

+        print(f"  {name}: in={module.in_features}, out={module.out_features}")

+        if len(list(policy.named_modules())) > 200:

+            break

+

+print("\n=== All parameters ===")

+total = sum(p.numel() for p in policy.parameters())

+print(f"Total parameters: {total:,}")

+

+# Find action expert modules

+print("\n=== Action expert modules ===")

+for name, module in policy.named_modules():

+    if 'action_expert' in name.lower() or 'expert' in name.lower():

+        print(f"  {name}: {type(module).__name__}")

+

+print("\n=== Top-level modules ===")

+for name, module in policy.named_children():

+    print(f"  {name}: {type(module).__name__}")

+    for subname, submodule in module.named_children():

+        print(f"    {subname}: {type(submodule).__name__}")
